---
title: "Support Materials"
subtitle: "Downloadable resources for Unit 5"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to Access
Click on any document link below to download or view. Materials are organised by type and will be updated throughout the academic year.
:::

## Lecture Slides & Handouts {#lectures}

Original lecture slide decks and annotated handouts from the taught sessions.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [Cortisol Full Lecture](docs/lectures/Cortisol_lecture_Full.pdf) | Complete lecture covering physiology through drug discovery | PDF |
| [Pathophysiology: Cushing's & Addison's](docs/lectures/Cortisol_lecture_Pathology.pdf) | Focused slides on cortisol pathophysiology | PDF |
| [NCX-1015 & Drug Discovery](docs/lectures/Cortisol_lecture_NCX1015.pdf) | Drug discovery case study slides | PDF |
| [Endocrine Revision Handout](docs/lectures/Endocrine_Revision_Handout.pdf) | Summary handout for HPA axis and GR signalling | PDF |
| [Lecture Summary Notes](docs/lectures/Unit5_Summary_Notes.pdf) | Condensed revision notes for all 5 parts | PDF |

:::

## Recommended Reading {#reading}

Key papers, reviews, and textbook chapters supporting this unit.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [Reading List — Unit 5](docs/reading/Unit5_Reading_List.pdf) | Complete annotated reading list | PDF |
| [Rhen & Cidlowski (2005) — NEJM Review](docs/reading/Rhen_Cidlowski_2005_NEJM.pdf) | Antiinflammatory action of glucocorticoids — new mechanisms for old drugs | PDF |
| [Paul-Clark et al. — NCX-1015](docs/reading/PaulClark_NCX1015.pdf) | Primary research paper on NCX-1015 | PDF |
| [Drug Discovery Pipeline — Overview](docs/reading/Drug_Discovery_Overview.pdf) | Background reading on drug development stages and costs | PDF |
| [Oakley & Cidlowski (2013) — GR Signalling](docs/reading/Oakley_Cidlowski_2013.pdf) | Review: Biology of the GR — new signaling mechanisms | PDF |

:::

## Past Exam Papers & Assessments {#exams}

Previous examination papers and example assessment questions for revision purposes.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [2024–25 Exam Paper](docs/exams/Exam_2024_25.pdf) | Previous year's examination paper | PDF |
| [2023–24 Exam Paper](docs/exams/Exam_2023_24.pdf) | Two years ago examination paper | PDF |
| [MCQ Practice Set](docs/exams/MCQ_Practice_Set.pdf) | Additional multiple choice practice questions | PDF |
| [SAQ Model Answers](docs/exams/SAQ_Model_Answers.pdf) | Model answers for short answer questions | PDF |
| [Essay Writing Guide](docs/exams/Essay_Guide.pdf) | Guidance on structuring pharmacology essays | PDF |

:::

## Practical & Laboratory Guides {#practicals}

Supporting materials for practical sessions and laboratory work.

::: {.lecture-card}

| Document | Description | Format |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| [Practical 1 — GR Binding Assay](docs/practicals/Practical1_GR_Binding.pdf) | Protocol and background for receptor binding practical | PDF |
| [Practical 2 — Inflammation Models](docs/practicals/Practical2_Inflammation_Models.pdf) | Overview of in vivo inflammation model methodology | PDF |
| [Data Analysis Guide](docs/practicals/Data_Analysis_Guide.pdf) | Statistical analysis guidance for practical reports | PDF |
| [Lab Report Template](docs/practicals/Lab_Report_Template.docx) | Template for practical report submissions | DOCX |
| [Health & Safety Information](docs/practicals/Health_Safety.pdf) | Risk assessments and safety procedures | PDF |

:::

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Can't Find What You Need?
All materials are also available on the [NTU NOW Learning Room](https://now.ntu.ac.uk/d2l/le/lessons/1120887/units/13808668) (Unit 5). Contact Dr Paul-Clark if you have difficulty accessing any resources.
:::

---

## Adding Your Own Files

::: {.callout-warning collapse="true"}
## For the module leader: How to update this page

To add your support documents from your local machine:

**Step 1:** Copy files from your local folder into the appropriate `docs/` subfolder:

```bash
# From your local machine
# Lectures
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/*.pdf docs/lectures/

# Reading materials  
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/reading/*.pdf docs/reading/

# Past exams
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/exams/*.pdf docs/exams/

# Practical guides
cp /Users/BIO3PAULM/Documents/Files/BIOL33141_CT\ Pharmacology/2025_26/practicals/*.pdf docs/practicals/
```

**Step 2:** Update the table entries above to match your actual filenames.

**Step 3:** Rebuild and deploy:

```bash
quarto render
git add -A
git commit -m "Added support materials"
git push
```

The site will automatically rebuild on GitHub Pages.

**File naming convention:** Use descriptive names without spaces, e.g., `Cortisol_Full_Lecture.pdf`, `Rhen_Cidlowski_2005.pdf`
:::
